!important;}.has-cool-to-warm-spectrum-gradient-background{background: var(--wp--preset--gradient--cool-to-warm-spectrum) !important;}.has-blush-light-purple-gradient-background{background: var(--wp--preset--gradient--blush-light-purple) !important;}.has-blush-bordeaux-gradient-background{background: var(--wp--preset--gradient--blush-bordeaux) var(--wp--preset--gradient--pale-ocean) !important;}.has-electric-grass-gradient-background{background: var(--wp--preset--gradient--electric-grass) !important;}.has-midnight-gradient-background{background: var(--wp--preset--gradient--midnight) !important;}.has-small-font-size{font-size: var(--wp--preset--font-size--small) !important;}.has-x-large-font-size{font-size: var(--wp--preset--font-size--x-large) !important;}

					</div>
				</div>
				</div>
		            </div><!-- end of header-elements -->
        </div><!-- end of wrapper -->
    </header><!-- end header -->

    <main id="main" class="aux-main aux-territory  aux-single aux-page aux-full-container no-sidebar aux-sidebar-style-border aux-user-entry" >
        <div class="aux-wrapper">
            <div class="aux-container aux-fold">

                <div id="primary" class="aux-primary" >
                    <div class="content" role="main"  >

					    <div class="aux-widget-container aux-simple-svg-container">
        <div class="aux-widget-container-inner">
            <div class="aux-the-svg"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100.001" height="100" viewBox="0 0 171.001 171"><defs><filter id="Orange_cyrcle" x="0" y="0" width="171.001" height="171"><feOffset dy="3" /><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="11.5" result="blur" /><feFlood flood-color="coral" flood-opacity="0.4" /><feComposite operator="in" in2="blur" /><feComposite in="SourceGraphic" /></filter></defs><g transform="matrix(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0)" filter="url(#Orange_cyrcle)"><path id="Orange_cyrcle-2" d="M51,0A51.377,51.377,0,0,0,40.722,1.036,50.72,50.72,0,0,0,22.485,8.71,51.149,51.149,0,0,0,4.008,31.149a50.744,50.744,0,0,0-2.972,9.573,51.5,51.5,0,0,0,0,20.557A50.721,50.721,0,0,0,8.71,79.515,51.149,51.149,0,0,0,31.149,97.993a50.742,50.742,0,0,0,9.573,2.972,51.5,51.5,0,0,0,20.557,0,50.72,50.72,0,0,0,18.236-7.674A51.149,51.149,0,0,0,97.992,70.852a50.744,50.744,0,0,0,2.972-9.573,51.5,51.5,0,0,0,0-20.557A50.722,50.722,0,0,0,93.29,22.486,51.149,51.149,0,0,0,70.852,4.008a50.743,50.743,0,0,0-9.573-2.972A51.377,51.377,0,0,0,51,0Zm.076,69.615a18.69,18.69,0,1,1,18.69-18.69A18.711,18.711,0,0,1,51.076,69.615Z" transform="translate(34.5 133.5) rotate(-90)" fill="coral" /></g></svg></div>
        </div>
    </div>
    				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-680ce95 aux-appear-watch-animation aux-fade-in-left-2 elementor-widget elementor-widget-aux_image" data-id="680ce95" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="aux_image.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<section class="widget-container aux-widget-image aux-alignnone aux-parent-au644cc2c6">
    <div class="aux-media-hint-frame ">
        <div class="aux-media-image " >
        
            

            
            <img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="733" height="677" src="https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Gashik_.png" class="aux-attachment aux-featured-image aux-attachment-id-3834" alt="_Gashik_" data-ratio="1.08" data-original-w="733" title="Indian Customs Info 19">            
                </div>
    </div>

</section><!-- widget-container -->				</div>
				</div>
				</div>
		<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-c817fe9 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="c817fe9" data-element_type="container">
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-94ef446 aux-appear-watch-animation aux-fade-in-right elementor-widget elementor-widget-aux_modern_heading" data-id="94ef446" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="aux_modern_heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<section class="aux-widget-modern-heading">
            <div class="aux-widget-inner"><h2 class="aux-modern-heading-primary">Who We Are</h2><h3 class="aux-modern-heading-secondary"><span class="aux-head-highlight">Simplifying Indian Customs for Businesses &amp; Traders</span></h3><div class="aux-modern-heading-description"><p>At Indian Customs Info, our mission is to demystify India's complex customs landscape. With a team of seasoned professionals, we offer reliable information and personalized services to businesses and individuals engaged in international trade.</p></div></div>
        </section>				</div>

                </div>

                        <article class="post column-entry post-62 type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-import tag-custom-duty-pay-online tag-custom-duty-payment tag-e-payment tag-icegate-epayment">

                        <article class="post column-entry post-250 type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-import tag-documents-required-for-custom-clearance-in-india tag-import-clearance tag-information-about-custom-clearance">
                                                        <div class="entry-media"><div class="aux-media-frame aux-media-image aux-image-mask"><a href="https://indiancustoms.info/documents-required-for-import-customs-clearance/"><img decoding="async" src="https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Documents-Required-For-Import-Customs-Clearance-970x611.png" class="aux-attachment aux-featured-image attachment-970x610.518 aux-attachment-id-3634 " alt="Documents Required For Import Customs Clearance" srcset="https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Documents-Required-For-Import-Customs-Clearance-150x94.png 150w,https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Documents-Required-For-Import-Customs-Clearance-300x189.png 300w,https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Documents-Required-For-Import-Customs-Clearance-768x483.png 768w,https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Documents-Required-For-Import-Customs-Clearance-1024x645.png 1024w,https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Documents-Required-For-Import-Customs-Clearance-970x611.png 970w,https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Documents-Required-For-Import-Customs-Clearance-1270x799.png 1270w" data-ratio="1.59" data-original-w="1280" sizes="(max-width:479px) 480px,(max-width:767px) 768px,(max-width:1023px) 1024px,970px" title="Indian Customs Info 25"></a></div></div>
                            
                            <div class="entry-main">
                                                                                                                            <span class="entry-badge aux-featured-color" data-featured-color="#1bb0ce">
                                        <a href="https://indiancustoms.info/documents-required-for-import-customs-clearance/">Import</a>
                                    </span>
                                
                                <div class="entry-info">
                                                                    <div class="entry-date">
                                        <a href="https://indiancustoms.info/documents-required-for-import-customs-clearance/">
                                            <time datetime="2019-02-23T15:48:57+05:30" title="2019-02-23T15:48:57+05:30" >February 23, 2019</time>
                                        </a>
                                    </div>
                                                                                                                                                                                                        </div>
                            
                                <header class="entry-header">
                                
                                    <h4 class="entry-title">
                                        <a href="https://indiancustoms.info/documents-required-for-import-customs-clearance/">
                                            Documents Required For Import Customs Clearance In India                                        </a>
                                    </h4>
                                                                    <div class="entry-format">
                                        <a href="https://indiancustoms.info/documents-required-for-import-customs-clearance/">
                                            <div class="post-format format-"> </div>
                                        </a>
                                    </div>
                                </header>
                            
                                                                                        <footer class="entry-meta aux-after-content">
                                                                        <div class="readmore">
                                        <a href="https://indiancustoms.info/documents-required-for-import-customs-clearance/" class="aux-read-more"><span class="aux-read-more-text">Read More</span></a>
                                    </div>
                                                                        <div class="comments-iconic">
                                                                            </div>
                                                                    </footer>
                            
                            </div>

                        </article>
</div><div class="aux-col post-273">
                        <article class="post column-entry post-273 type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-import tag-cha-documentation-process tag-import-documentation-process tag-import-procedure tag-import-procedure-in-india tag-import-procedure-in-india-step-by-step">
                                                        <div class="entry-media"><div class="aux-media-frame aux-media-image aux-image-mask"><a href="https://indiancustoms.info/import-procedure-and-documentation/"><img decoding="async" src="https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Import-Procedure-And-Documentation-970x611.png" class="aux-attachment aux-featured-image attachment-970x610.518 aux-attachment-id-3635 " alt="Import Procedure And Documentation" srcset="https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Import-Procedure-And-Documentation-150x94.png 150w,https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Import-Procedure-And-Documentation-300x189.png 300w,https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Import-Procedure-And-Documentation-768x483.png 768w,https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Import-Procedure-And-Documentation-1024x645.png 1024w,https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Import-Procedure-And-Documentation-970x611.png 970w,https://indiancustoms.info/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Import-Procedure-And-Documentation-1270x799.png 1270w" data-ratio="1.59" data-original-w="1280" sizes="(max-width:479px) 480px,(max-width:767px) 768px,(max-width:1023px) 1024px,970px" title="Indian Customs Info 26"></a></div></div>

                                <header class="entry-header">
                                
                                    <h4 class="entry-title">

                        <article class="post column-entry post-293 type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-import tag-how-to-calculate-assessable-value tag-how-to-calculate-igst-value">

                        <article class="post column-entry post-304 type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-import tag-re-import-after-repair tag-re-import-for-repair tag-re-import-of-rejected-goods">

				</div>
		<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-7d135ac e-flex e-con-boxed e-con e-child" data-id="7d135ac" data-element_type="container">
					<div class="e-con-inner">

<script>(function() {function maybePrefixUrlField () {
  const value = this.value.trim()
  if (value !== '' && value.indexOf('http') !== 0) {
    this.value = 'http://' + value
  }
}

const urlFields = document.querySelectorAll('.mc4wp-form input[type="url"]')
for (let j = 0; j < urlFields.length; j++) {
  urlFields[j].addEventListener('blur', maybePrefixUrlField)
}
})();</script>			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>
				<script>
		(function () {
			var c = document.body.className;
			c = c.replace(/woocommerce-no-js/, 'woocommerce-js');
			document.body.className = c;
		})();
	</script>
